# ts-lib-template — Full API Reference

> One-line description

<!-- Complete API documentation for LLM context windows -->

## Exports

All imports come from the package root:

```typescript
import {} from 'ts-lib-template';
```

---

## Source

- Repository: https://github.com/axelhamil/ts-lib-template
- License: MIT
- Runtime: Node >= 24, ESM only
- Build: tsdown (ESM, dts, sourcemap, minify, treeshake)
- Types validated with publint + are-the-types-wrong
